findings.description: waitForGridLoaded permanently times out on empty tables — condition !statusBar.textContent?.includes('Showing 0') returns false for 'Showing 0 - 0 of 0'
findings.fix_description: Change condition to resolve on any non-empty status bar text: statusBar !== null && (statusBar.textContent?.trim() ?? '') !== ''

findings.description: SQL injection filter test hardcodes 'vehicle_logs' in assertion — fails unconditionally on any DB without that table name
findings.fix_description: Dynamically fetch table name from /api/tables before the injection test (same pattern as URL injection test at line 129)

findings.description: pendingRowsResponse() accepts HTTP 4xx as successful data load — resp.status() < 500 should be resp.ok() for data-correctness tests
findings.fix_description: Change resp.status() < 500 to resp.ok() in pendingRowsResponse(). For error-state tests that need to accept 4xx, use a separate helper or inline waitForResponse

findings.description: Tautological assertions — expect(filteredTotal).toBeGreaterThanOrEqual(0) and expect(searchTotal).toBeGreaterThanOrEqual(0) pass unconditionally on any value
findings.fix_description: Replace >=0 with expect(filteredTotal).toBeLessThan(initialTotal) for filter tests where data guarantees matches. Remove the vacuous >=0 assertions entirely.

findings.description: Sort cycling test verifies UI state only (ARIA label) — no pendingRowsResponse() call, no assertion on actual sorted data order
findings.fix_description: Add pendingRowsResponse() after each header click and assert that the first visible row's value is correct for the sort direction

findings.description: Double release build — Justfile test-e2e runs cargo build --release, then global-setup.ts runs it again unless SEEKI_SKIP_BUILD=1
findings.fix_description: Pass SEEKI_SKIP_BUILD=1 to the Playwright command in the Justfile test-e2e recipe

concessions.point: F7 localStorage bleed — Playwright isolates BrowserContext per test
F7 localStorage bleed — confirmed Playwright isolation
Finding D config crash recovery — downgraded, backup exists
F1 double build is a real defect
Finding B — sort test verifies UI only

summary: The E2E test infrastructure is well-designed with proper credential separation, config backup/restore, and broad coverage across 5 feature areas. The debate substantiated 6 findings: 2 bugs (empty-table timeout, hardcoded table name) and 4 improvements (4xx acceptance, tautological assertions, UI-only sort test, double build). All are fixable in the current PR. CI path (Finding C) is a tracked gap. Cross-browser (F5) and wizard integration (F2) are follow-on enhancements.
